verbatim_excerpt: I was copying quotes into three different docs and losing the thread.
I needed a report where every claim pointed back to the actual interview evidence.
Once we had more than a few interviews, the synthesis got slow and inconsistent.
I wanted a shared codebook so the next pass did not start from scratch.
The hard part was not summarizing one interview; it was seeing patterns across all of them.
The output had to be reusable by the team, not just understandable to the person who ran the interviews.
